D2-2:   <span class="math inline">\\(\\phi_f F_u A_e\\)</span>   |   Net area per AISC B4.3b, shear lag per AISC D3.1</em></p> <h3 id="side-member-fracture">3.1 Side Member Fracture</h3> <p>Hole deduction: <span class="math inline">\\(d_h = d_b + \\frac{1}{8}\\)</span>" per AISC B4.3b</p> <p><span class="math display">\\[ A_{e,side} = A_{g,side} - n_{bolts}(d_b + \\tfrac{1}{8})t_s = 4.2500 - (1)(1.125)(0.5) = 3.6875 \\text{ in}^2 \\]</span></p> <p><span class="math display">\\[ \\phi_f F_{u,side} A_{e,side} = (0.75)(58)(3.6875) = 160.4062 \\text{ k} \\]</span></p> <blockquote> <p><strong>✅ GOOD</strong>   <strong>SM Fracture (vs max(P,V))</strong>  |  Capacity = 160.406 k  ≥  Demand = 20.000 k</p> </blockquote> <h3 id="main-member-fracture">3.2 Main Member Fracture</h3> <p>Shear lag factor <span class="math inline">\\(U\\)</span> per AISC Table D3.1:</p> <p><span class="math display">\\[ A_{n,main} = A_{g,main} - n_{bolts}(d_b + \\tfrac{1}{8})t_m = 10.6 - (1)(1.125)(0.295) = 10.2681 \\text{ in}^2 \\]</span></p> <p><span class="math display">\\[ U = 1 - \\frac{\\bar{x}}{L} = 1 - \\frac{0.75}{6.0} = 0.8750 \\]</span></p> <p><span class="math display">\\[ A_{e,main} = A_{n,main} \\cdot U = (10.2681)(0.8750) = 8.9846 \\text{ in}^2 \\]</span></p> <p><span class="math display">\\[ \\phi_f F_{u,main} A_{e,main} = (0.75)(65)(8.9846) = 437.9997 \\text{ k} \\]</span></p> <blockquote> <p><strong>✅ GOOD</strong>   <strong>MM Fracture (vs max(P,V))</strong>  |  Capacity = 438.000 k  ≥  Demand = 20.000 k</p> </blockquote> <hr/> <h2 id="block-shear">4. Block Shear</h2> <p><em>AISC Eq. J4-5:   <span class="math inline">\\(\\phi_{bs}[0.6F A_{shear} + F_u A_{net,tension}]\\)</span></em></p> <p>Failure plane: shear rupture along bolt group + tension rupture across edge distance.</p> <h3 id="main-member-block-shear">4.1 Main Member Block Shear</h3> <p>Failure along both shear planes flanking the bolt group:</p> <p><span class="math display">\\[ A_{gv} = t_m \\cdot 2(n_{rows}-1)s = (0.295) \\cdot 2(3-1)(3.0) = 3.5400 \\text{ in}^2 \\]</span></p> <p><span class="math display">\\[ A_{nv} = A_{gv} - (d_b+\\tfrac{1}{8})t_m = 0.7375 - (1.125)(0.295) = 0.4056 \\text{ in}^2 \\]</span></p> <p><span class="math display">\\[ \\phi_{bs}[0.6 F_{y} A_{gv} + F_u A_{nt}] = (0.75)[0.6(50)(3.5400) + (65)(0.4056)] = 99.4242 \\text{ k} \\quad \\text{(yielding)} \\]</span></p> <p><span class="math display">\\[ \\phi_{bs}[0.6 F_{u} A_{nv} + F_u A_{nt}] = (0.75)[0.6(65)(2.8763) + (65)(0.4056)] = 103.9045 \\text{ k} \\quad \\text{(fracture)} \\]</span></p> <p>Controlling mechanism: <strong>YIELDING</strong>  →  <span class="math inline">\\(\\phi R_n = 99.4242\\)</span> k</p> <blockquote> <p><strong>✅ GOOD</strong>   <strong>MM Block Shear (vs max(P,V))</strong>  |  Capacity = 99.424 k  ≥  Demand = 20.000 k</p> </blockquote> <h3 id="side-member-block-shear-shear-y-direction">4.2 Side Member Block Shear — Shear (y-direction)</h3> <p><span class="math display">\\[ A_{gv} = t_s(L_{ex} + (n_{bolts}-1)g) = (0.5)(1.25 + (1-1)(3.0)) = 0.6250 \\text{ in}^2 \\]</span></p> <p><span class="math display">\\[ A_{nv} = A_{gv} - \\tfrac{1}{2}(d_b+\\tfrac{1}{8})t_s = 0.6250 - 0.5625(0.5) = 0.3438 \\text{ in}^2 \\]</span></p> <p>Controlling mechanism: <strong>FRACTURE</strong>  →  <span class="math inline">\\(\\phi R_n = 72.8625\\)</span> k</p> <blockquote> <p><strong>✅ GOOD</strong>   <strong>SM Block Shear — axial (vs P)</strong>  |  Capacity = 72.862 k  ≥  Demand = 0.000 k</p> </blockquote> <hr/> <h2 id="bearing-strength-at-bolt-holes">5.
